name: MXToolbox
description: Email header analysis & DNS checks Tool: https://mxtoolbox.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #677 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map MXToolbox output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
